_meta.source: Claude training data (cutoff May 2025) - NOT live web research
_meta.warning: VERIFY ALL DATA before contacting. Websites, contacts, and commission structures may have changed. WebSearch was unavailable during generation.
search_queries_intended: booking agency live musicians Mediterranean hotels
entertainment agency beach bars Spain Greece
live music agency resort hotels Europe summer 2025 2026
booking agent acoustic musicians ibiza costa brava
agenzie booking musicisti live hotel resort Italia

agencies.name: Soulfire Artists
agencies.how_to_apply: Website submission form with EPK, video links, availability
agencies.notes: Strong in Balearic scene. They book live acts alongside DJs. Good fit for sunset/ambient performers.

agencies.name: Ibiza Music Agency (IMA)
agencies.how_to_apply: Email with EPK, live video, rate card, availability calendar
agencies.notes: One of the established agencies specifically for Ibiza hospitality circuit. They supply live music to hotels and upscale venues year-round but peak summer.

agencies.name: MN2S
agencies.how_to_apply: https://mn2s.com/submit-artist/ - online submission with press kit
agencies.notes: Large agency, primarily DJs but has a live music division. Higher threshold for acceptance. Worth trying if you have strong credentials (festivals, media).

agencies.name: Elastic Artists
agencies.how_to_apply: Email demos and EPK to booking team
agencies.notes: Known for curating organic/electronic crossover acts. Good fit for live looping + acoustic + electronic hybrid.

agencies.name: Dorado Music / Jose Padilla Legacy Circuit
agencies.website: Search for current operators - this circuit is managed by several promoters
agencies.contact: Research needed - network through Ibiza music community
agencies.how_to_apply: Network-based. Connect through Ibiza music community, sunset bar residency applications
agencies.notes: Not a single agency but a circuit of sunset venues in Ibiza that book ambient/acoustic live acts. The Cafe del Mar, Kumharas, Savannah Beach Club network. Apply directly to each venue or through local promoters.

agencies.name: VonGold Entertainment
agencies.how_to_apply: Contact via website with demo material and availability
agencies.notes: Spanish entertainment agency focused on hospitality. They supply live music to hotel chains and beach venues along Spanish coast.

agencies.name: Fever Entertainment / Live Music Spain
agencies.website: Search 'live music agency Marbella' for current website
agencies.how_to_apply: Email with video demos and rate card
agencies.notes: Marbella/Costa del Sol has a dense circuit of beach clubs and hotels needing live music May-October. Multiple small agencies operate here.

agencies.name: Terraforma / MiSoNo Agency Network
agencies.how_to_apply: Open call submissions for festival; agency bookings through network
agencies.notes: Italian experimental/ambient scene hub. Not a traditional booking agency but a network that connects to Italian luxury hospitality. Good for building Italian connections.

agencies.name: Viva Musica Entertainment
agencies.website: Search 'viva musica entertainment Greece' or 'live music agency Athens'
agencies.how_to_apply: Email with video, EPK, and summer availability
agencies.notes: Greek islands have massive demand for live acoustic/ambient acts May-October. Multiple agencies operate. Search 'entertainment agency Mykonos' and 'live music agency Santorini' for current operators.

agencies.name: Domus Entertainment
agencies.website: Research needed - search 'domus entertainment greece music'
agencies.how_to_apply: Network referral preferred; cold email with strong EPK and video
agencies.notes: Greek luxury hospitality entertainment. The Mykonos/Santorini circuit is extremely lucrative but competitive. Having festival credentials (like Greece's Got Talent) is a strong opener.

agencies.name: Split Music Agency / Adriatic Entertainment
agencies.website: Search 'live music agency Split Croatia' or 'entertainment agency Hvar Dubrovnik'
agencies.notes: Croatia's Adriatic coast is growing fast as a summer music destination. Hvar and Dubrovnik in particular have demand for live ambient/acoustic acts. The market is less saturated than Ibiza/Mykonos.

agencies.name: Lusomundo / Portuguese Entertainment Agencies
agencies.website: Search 'entertainment agency Algarve live music' or 'booking agency Portugal hotels'
agencies.how_to_apply: Email with EPK and summer availability
agencies.notes: Portugal (especially Algarve and Comporta) is booming for wellness/ambient music. Good match for RAV Vast + sound healing positioning. Search 'Comporta entertainment' for the luxury boutique hotel circuit.

agencies.name: Artisti in Riviera / Riviera Music Agency
agencies.website: Search 'agenzia spettacoli riviera romagnola' or 'entertainment agency Italian Riviera'
agencies.how_to_apply: Email or phone with demo material
agencies.notes: The Italian beach club circuit (lidi/bagni) books enormous amounts of live music June-September. Multiple regional agencies handle this. Also search for agencies in Puglia (Salento) and Sardinia.

agencies.name: Soundsuit / Hotel Music Platforms
music_styles: Background music primarily - may include live booking
agencies.notes: Music-as-a-service for hospitality. Primarily curated playlists but some hotel chains use platforms like this to source live acts. Worth investigating if they have a live music division.

agencies.name: Encore Musicians
agencies.how_to_apply: Create profile on platform, upload videos and set rates
agencies.notes: Online marketplace for booking musicians. Not Mediterranean-specific but has good presence in European destination weddings and hotel events. Good for supplementary income.

agencies.name: Alive Network
music_styles: All genres including acoustic, ambient, world music
agencies.notes: Large UK-based entertainment agency with growing Mediterranean presence through destination weddings and corporate retreats.

agencies.name: Peligrosa / Mediterranean Music Collective
agencies.notes: Placeholder for the growing wellness/yoga retreat circuit that books sound healers and ambient musicians. Search 'sound healing booking agency Europe' and 'yoga retreat entertainment'. This is a real and growing market segment, especially for RAV Vast/handpan players.

additional_search_strategies.description: Many Mediterranean venues don't use agencies - they book directly. Use Google Maps to find venues, then email entertainment directors.
The handpan community has its own booking networks. Other RAV Vast endorsed artists share venue contacts.
Large chains like Marriott, Four Seasons, Aman, Six Senses have entertainment/experience coordinators who book directly.
contacts: Six Senses Hotels (wellness focused - perfect for sound healing)

additional_search_strategies.description: Playing festivals leads to agency discovery. Agencies scout at festivals.
relevant_festivals: Envision Festival (Costa Rica - but connects to Mediterranean circuit)
Burning Man regional events in EU

additional_search_strategies.description: Search 'sound healing facilitator booking Europe' - this is a separate circuit from music booking but very relevant for RAV Vast.
platforms: Insight Timer (build audience, get retreat invitations)

recommended_next_steps: Run these searches via a web browser or Claude with web search enabled to verify and expand
Prioritize agencies that explicitly mention 'live acoustic' or 'ambient' or 'world music'
Use Greece's Got Talent credential as door opener - it's unusual and memorable
The Drishti Beats / IHF connection is strong social proof for the festival-to-agency pipeline
Consider creating a dedicated EPK page on link-hub/ for agency submissions
